name: Best RCCG Region – Agricultural Innovation
description: This award recognises the RCCG Region that has most significantly contributed to agricultural development through innovative projects, food security efforts, agribusiness empowerment, and community farming initiatives.

fields.label: Do you reside in Redemption City or an RCCG Region?
In less than 200 words, describe any unique or innovative agricultural initiatives driven by the region (e.g. greenhouses, irrigation systems, vertical farming, organic production).
In less than 200 words, explain how the region has used agriculture to empower youth and community members with skills, tools, or opportunities for self-reliance.
In less than 200 words, describe how the region's agricultural programs contribute to food security, sustainability, or poverty alleviation.
In less than 200 words, describe the reach and scalability of the region's agricultural activities (e.g. multiple farms, church-wide cooperatives, partnerships, or rural expansion).
